documentation:
## Aliyun ROS EAIS Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as EAIS from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-eais';
```

modules.name: ros_cdk_eais
documentation:
## Aliyun ROS EAIS Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as EAIS from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-eais';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_eais.ClientInstanceAttachment

methods.name: ros_cdk_eais.ClientInstanceAttachment.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_eais.ClientInstanceAttachment.attr_client_instance_id
documentation: Attribute ClientInstanceId: The ID of the ECS or ECI instance bound to the EAIS instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_eais.ClientInstanceAttachment.attr_instance_id
documentation: Attribute InstanceId: The EAIS instance ID.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::EAIS::ClientInstanceAttachment`, which is used to attach an Elastic Accelerated Computing Instances (EAIS) instance to an Elastic Compute Service (ECS) instance or elastic container instance of a user.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosClientInstanceAttachment\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-eais-clientinstanceattachment>

methods.name: ros_cdk_eais.ClientInstanceAttachmentProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `ClientInstanceAttachment`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-eais-clientinstanceattachment>

```
param client_instance_id

Property clientInstanceId: The ID of the ECS or ECI instance bound to the EAIS instance.

param instance_id

Property instanceId: The EAIS instance ID.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_eais.ClientInstanceAttachmentProps.client_instance_id
documentation: Property clientInstanceId: The ID of the ECS or ECI instance bound to the EAIS instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_eais.ClientInstanceAttachmentProps.instance_id
documentation: Property instanceId: The EAIS instance ID.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::EAIS::Instance`, which is used to create an Elastic Accelerated Computing Instances (EAIS) instance.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosInstance\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-eais-instance>

methods.name: ros_cdk_eais.InstanceProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Instance`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-eais-instance>

```
param create_with_notebook

Property createWithNotebook: When the value is true, CreateEaiJupyter is called to create an eais instance, and when the value is false, CreateEai is called to create an eais instance.

param instance_type

Property instanceType: EAIS instance type.

param security_group_id

Property securityGroupId: Security group ID.

param v_switch_id

Property vSwitchId: Switch ID.

param environment_var

Property environmentVar: Setting environment variables in eais instance on Initialization.

param instance_name

Property instanceName: Name of the instance.

param payment_type

Property paymentType: The payment type of the resource.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_eais.InstanceProps.create_with_notebook
documentation: Property createWithNotebook: When the value is true, CreateEaiJupyter is called to create an eais instance, and when the value is false, CreateEai is called to create an eais instance.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::EAIS::ClientInstanceAttachment`, which is used to attach an Elastic Accelerated Computing Instances (EAIS) instance to an Elastic Compute Service (ECS) instance or elastic container instance of a user.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `ClientInstanceAttachment` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-eais-clientinstanceattachment>

documentation: Attribute ZoneId: The ID of the region to which the EAIS instance belongs.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::EAIS::Instance`, which is used to query the information about a created Elastic Accelerated Computing Instances (EAIS) instance.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosInstance\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-eais-instance>

methods.name: ros_cdk_eais.datasource.InstanceProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Instance`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-eais-instance>

```
param instance_id

Property instanceId: Elastic accelerated instance ID.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_eais.datasource.InstanceProps.instance_id
documentation: Property instanceId: Elastic accelerated instance ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_eais.datasource.InstanceProps.refresh_options
documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.

refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
Default is Never.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::EAIS::Instance`, which is used to query the information about a created Elastic Accelerated Computing Instances (EAIS) instance.
